entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
In addition to reading a variety of poems from 19th century authors, students read biographies of two famous 19th century poets and dive into Virgil's Aeneid. 

This topic is included in the following course(s): Literature: Grade 11, Literature: Grade 12, Literature: Grade 9, Literature: Grade 10

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: Students new or struggling in their relationship with poetry should use Grade 8 lessons.

rows.label: Poetry Reading: Grades 9-12
rows.books: Poetry, The Lightning Dreamer: Cuba's Greatest Abolitionist, The Crescent Moon, The Aeneid, Jump Back, Paul: The Life and Poems of Paul Laurence Dunbar
